metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_2446
metadata.comment:
Rationale: The work utilizes vGlut pHluorin in neurons deficient in alpha, beta and gamma synuclein to establish a deficit in the rate of synaptic vesicle endocytosis (figure 1a). Measuring the stimulation dependent appearance of cell surface fluorescence (exocytosis) and disappearance (endocytosis) shows a selective deficit in endocytosis (Figure 1f-h). Systematically rescuing against this defect with the heterologous expression of the individual alpha, beta and gamma synucleins identifies that each are independently capable of fully performing this function (Figure 2 b).

19/01/2018 Pim
- The experiments use a triple KO animal combined with re-expression rescue experiments.
- I have not created the equivalent annotation for gamma synuclein since its presence in the presynaptic terminal has not been established.. Experimental description: Material and methods. Mice. Generation and characterization of synuclein null..................
Figure 2......................neurons transfected with mouse alpha-syn...................
